debug_info.goal:
case neg
x : IGame
p : Player
z : IGame
hy : z ∈ moves p x
h : ¬@IGame.Reversible x z p
⊢ ¬@IGame.Reversible (@IGame.unreverse x) (@IGame.unreverse z) p

failed_attempts:
intro h'
    apply h
    cases p with
    | left =>
      rw [reversible_left] at h' ⊢
      obtain ⟨w, hw, hw'⟩ := h'
      rw [moves_unreverse] at hw
      simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hw
      obtain ⟨w', hw'', w'', hw''', rfl⟩ := hw
      have := subposition_of_mem_reverseSet hw'' hw'''
      refine ⟨w'', ?_, ?_⟩
      · exact (reverseSet_of_not_reversible h ▸ hw''' : w'' ∈ {y}).symm ▸ hw''
      · calc w'' ≈ unreverse w'' := (unreverse_equiv w'').symm
          _ ≤ unreverse x := hw'.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le
          _ ≈ x := unreverse_equiv x
    | right =>
      rw [reversible_right] at h' ⊢
      obtain ⟨w, hw, hw'⟩ := h'
      rw [moves_unreverse] at hw
      simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hw
      obtain ⟨w', hw'', w'', hw''', rfl⟩ := hw
      have := subposition_of_mem_reverseSet hw'' hw'''
      refine ⟨w'', ?_, ?_⟩
      · exact (reverseSet_of_not_reversible h ▸ hw''' : w'' ∈ {y}).symm ▸ hw''
      · calc x ≈ unreverse x := (unreverse_equiv x).symm
          _ ≤ unreverse w'' := (unreverse_equiv x).le.trans hw'
          _ ≈ w'' := unreverse_equiv w''

intro h'
    apply h
    cases p with
    | left =>
      rw [reversible_left] at h' ⊢
      obtain ⟨w, hw, hw'⟩ := h'
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨w, hw, ⟨v, hv, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      have := subposition_of_mem_reverseSet hw hv
      rw [reverseSet] at hv
      split_ifs at hv with hrev
      · exact ⟨hrev.choose, hrev.choose_mem_moves, 
          (unreverse_equiv _).ge.trans (hw'.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le)⟩
      · subst hv
        exact ⟨w, hw, (unreverse_equiv _).ge.trans (hw'.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le)⟩
    | right =>
      rw [reversible_right] at h' ⊢
      obtain ⟨w, hw, hw'⟩ := h'
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨w, hw, ⟨v, hv, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      have := subposition_of_mem_reverseSet hw hv
      rw [reverseSet] at hv
      split_ifs at hv with hrev
      · exact ⟨hrev.choose, hrev.choose_mem_moves,
          (unreverse_equiv x).ge.trans (hw'.trans (unreverse_equiv _).le)⟩
      · subst hv
        exact ⟨w, hw, (unreverse_equiv x).ge.trans (hw'.trans (unreverse_equiv _).le)⟩

intro hrev
    apply h
    cases p
    · obtain ⟨w, hw, hwle⟩ := hrev
      rw [moves_unreverse] at hw
      simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hw
      obtain ⟨a, ha, b, hb, rfl⟩ := hw
      have := subposition_of_mem_reverseSet ha hb
      refine ⟨b, ?_, (unreverse_equiv b).ge.trans (hwle.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le)⟩
      exact hb.1
    · obtain ⟨w, hw, hwle⟩ := hrev
      rw [moves_unreverse] at hw
      simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hw
      obtain ⟨a, ha, b, hb, rfl⟩ := hw
      have := subposition_of_mem_reverseSet ha hb
      refine ⟨b, ?_, (unreverse_equiv x).ge.trans (hwle.trans (unreverse_equiv b).le)⟩
      exact hb.1
termination_by x
decreasing_by igame_wf

          _ ≤ unreverse x := hw'
          _ ≈ x := unreverse_equiv x
